name: Al Hirschfeld
abstract: Albert Hirschfeld (June 21, 1903 – January 20, 2003) was an American caricaturist best known for his black-and-white portraits of celebrities and Broadway stars.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: my father had become very friendly with the great cartoonist Al Hirschfeld
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 9, 2013
